synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2026-2418 Oracle Linux 8 gcc-toolset-14-gcc bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-2418
description:
[14.2.1-11]
- Add missing headers arm_neon_sve_bridge.h and arm_sme.h for aarch64 (RHEL-124629)
full_text:
